title: The Bouncy Bubble
premise_summary: A bubble won’t stop bouncing higher
cover_description: Melody, mouth open in shock, watches a giant bubble bounce on Saturn’s rings while her wand floats away.
host_intro: Tonight, Melody blows one bubble. It does not stop bouncing.
host_outro: Melody’s bubble is still bouncing. It has plans.
script:
[TITLE: The Bouncy Bubble]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Melody blows one bubble. It does not stop bouncing.]
[HOST_OUTRO: Melody’s bubble is still bouncing. It has plans.]
[AGE: 2-5]
[VOICES: musical_original]
[COMEDY_TYPE: physical_escalation]

[SETUP]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: excited, gentle] I dip my wand in soapy water. [STING: musical_flourish]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: confident] I blow one tiny bubble. [STING: tiny]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: curious] It floats... then bounces off my nose. [STING: boing]

[BEAT_1]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] It bounces off the floor! [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: suspicious] It bounces off the wall! [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: scrambling] It bounces off my head! [STING: boing]

[BEAT_2]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: panicked] It bounces over the table! [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: desperate] It bounces over the lamp! [STING: boing]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: outraged] It bounces over the ceiling fan! [STING: big_crash]

[BEAT_3]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: stunned] It bounces out the window! [STING: whoosh]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: tentative] It bounces into the sky! [STING: buildup_long]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] It bounces past the moon. [STING: silence]

[BUTTON]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: loud, triumphant] [PUNCHLINE]Now it’s bouncing on Saturn’s rings![/PUNCHLINE] [STING: musical_detuned]
[MELODY] [DELIVERY: deflated] I think I lost my wand. [STING: splat]

[COVER: Melody, mouth open in shock, watches a giant bubble bounce on Saturn’s rings while her wand floats away.]
[PREMISE: A bubble won’t stop bouncing higher]
